items: Added Claude (claude.ai) as a third provider — a lightweight integration: Claude removes its sidebar and chat history when embedded in the side panel. Bookmarks and 'Open in browser' work normally; use a regular browser tab on claude.ai for the full sidebar / history experience.
Settings now shows a one-line note beneath each limited-scope provider explaining its constraints
Limited-scope tabs get a brand-colored accent stripe on the tab pill so you can spot them at a glance
First time you open a limited-scope provider tab, a dismissible hint strip appears above the iframe explaining the limitations; dismiss with 'Got it' (per-provider, one-time — reset from Settings)
Single-provider mode: when only one provider is enabled in Settings, the '+' new-chat button collapses to a one-click shortcut showing that provider's icon
Note: Chrome will prompt to re-grant permissions on update because claude.ai was added to host permissions
Note: 'Open in browser' uses your main browser profile, which may be signed in as a different account than the side-panel session
Note: Claude tab titles can lag because there's no sidebar to scrape — we rely on Claude's <title> updates
Fixed: ChatGPT tab titles now reliably reflect navigation inside the app (new chat, switching conversations) without needing to switch tabs in the side panel
Fixed: ChatGPT tab titles now update reliably when starting a new chat or switching conversations inside the app (observes the conversation history list directly)
Branded provider icons: real Gemini sparkle and OpenAI monoblossom on tabs and bookmarks
New Chat: single '+' button reveals a vertical provider picker on hover, click, or keyboard
Provider picker is keyboard-accessible (Enter/Space/Arrow keys, Escape to close)
Bookmarks now show the originating provider's icon before the title
Existing bookmarks are auto-migrated to remember their provider
Zoom slider in Settings now resizes the panel live while you drag
Removed unused Gemini PNG assets
Renamed to 'AI MultiTab Sidepanel'
ChatGPT support alongside Gemini
Per-provider New Chat buttons
Provider icon on each tab
Drag-and-drop tab reordering
Enable/disable providers in Settings (first-run picker)
Code organization: settings styles moved to a separate stylesheet
Fixed: release notes modal now scrolls when content exceeds the visible area
Release notes content moved to a dedicated data file
Improved security: reduced unnecessary header modifications
Added data validation and error recovery for stored tabs & bookmarks
Flush pending state on panel close to prevent data loss
Use crypto.randomUUID() for tab IDs (collision-safe)
Smooth theme transitions (no flash on panel open)
Material 3 tonal error colors (WCAG AA contrast)
Keyboard navigation for tab bar (arrows, Enter, Delete)
ARIA labels on icon buttons for screen readers
Focus restoration after closing tabs (no focus theft)
Release Notes & version info in Settings
Bookmarks with edit & broken-link detection
Persistent tabs across panel reopens
Light & dark theme with system preference
Content zoom (50%–120%)
Open current tab in browser
Buy-me-a-coffee link in toolbar
